revision.comment: Bot: Creating normal ill redirect for [[Category:Lua-based templates]].
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Template usage]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:pages created from Interlanguage links]] [[ja:qq]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "↵[[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects T]]" to " <noinclude>[[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects T]]</noinclude>"
Bot: remove deleted category Automatic wikipedia template redirects T

revision.text:
<!-- Curly brackets matching should ignore [^}], \{{!}}; insource:/\{} is OK. --><onlyinclude><!-- Make a search link. -->{{plain link |url = {{fullurl:Special:Search|search=<!-- -->{{urlencode:<!-- encodes spaces, so let's avoid unnecessary spaces.
Build this query: hastemplate: template insource:/\{\{ *[Tt]emplate *\| *[^}]*pattern/
Add the ever present "hastemplate:" filter and a space -->hastemplate:"{{{template|{{{1|Template usage}}}}}}" <!--
Add the "insource:/\{\{ *" -->insource:/\{\{ *<!--
Add the "[Tt]". Save from an expensive, /regexp/i. -->[{{#invoke:String|sub<!-- saw first [ of a "[Tt]" --> |{{uc:{{{template|{{{1|Template usage}}}}}}}}|1|1}}{{#invoke:String|sub |{{lc:{{{template|{{{1|Template usage}}}}}}}}|1|1}}]{{#invoke:String|sub <!-- ^ You saw ].
Add "emplate", the rest of the template name, starting from char 2.--> |{{{template|{{{1|Template usage}}}}}}|2}}<!--
Add the tricky regexp part. --> *\{{!}}[^}]*<!-- optional space " *" around initial pipe initial pipe is \|, i.e. \{{!}} Trickiest part: [character class] inverted with ^: [^any char NOT }] Zero or more (*) of those "non-curly brackets". All this stuff always matches, shows in bold in the search results
Add the users regexp pattern part and closing /. -->{{{pattern|{{{2|''regexp''}}}}}}/<!--
Add "prefix:" You see the space before it. --> prefix:<!-- -->{{#switch:<!-- add namespace "numbers and letters" recognition --> {{{prefix|{{{3|}}}}}} |#default = {{{prefix|{{{3|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}}} |n = {{NAMESPACE}} |0|: = : |1 = {{ns:1}}: |2 = {{ns:2}}: |3 = {{ns:3}}: |4 = {{ns:4}}: |5 = {{ns:5}}: |6 = {{ns:6}}: |7 = {{ns:7}}: |8 = {{ns:8}}: |9 = {{ns:9}}: |10 = {{ns:10}}: |11 = {{ns:11}}: |12 = {{ns:12}}: |13 = {{ns:13}}: |14 = {{ns:14}}: |15 = {{ns:15}}: |100 = {{ns:100}}: |101 = {{ns:101}}: |118 = {{ns:118}}: |119 = {{ns:119}}: |710 = {{ns:710}}: |711 = {{ns:711}}: |828 = {{ns:828}}: |829 = {{ns:829}}: }} }}<!-- End urlencode. --> }}<!-- End fullurl url done Now for name param of plainlinks.
Appearance of link looks just like the query, unless labeled. So we're rebuilding the query just for show this time. --> |name = <!-- for commentary see duplicate above --> {{#if: {{{label|{{{4|}}}}}} |{{{label|{{{4}}}}}} |{{#if: {{{prefix|{{{3|}}}}}}
|hastemplate:"{{{template|{{{1|Template usage}}}}}}" <!-- -->insource:/\{\{ *<!-- -->[{{#invoke:String|sub<!-- saw first [ of a "[Tt]" --> |{{uc:{{{template|{{{1|Template usage}}}}}}}}|1|1}}{{#invoke:String|sub |{{lc:{{{template|{{{1|Template usage}}}}}}}}|1|1}}]{{#invoke:String|sub |{{{template|{{{1|Template usage}}}}}}|2}}<!-- ^ --> *\{{!}}[^}]*<!-- optional space " *" around initial pipe -->{{#invoke:String|replace |{{#invoke:String|replace |{{{pattern|{{{2|''regexp''}}}}}}<!-- Given pattern -->|[|[}}<!-- Replace any/all [ with HTML symbol -->|]|]}}/<!-- replace any/all ] with there HTML symbol --> prefix:<!-- -->{{#switch:<!-- add namespace "numbers and letters" recognition --> {{{prefix|{{{3|}}}}}} |#default = {{{prefix|{{{3|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}}} |n = {{NAMESPACE}} |0|: = <nowiki />: |1 = {{ns:1}}: |2 = {{ns:2}}: |3 = {{ns:3}}: |4 = {{ns:4}}: |5 = {{ns:5}}: |6 = {{ns:6}}: |7 = {{ns:7}}: |8 = {{ns:8}}: |9 = {{ns:9}}: |10 = {{ns:10}}: |11 = {{ns:11}}: |12 = {{ns:12}}: |13 = {{ns:13}}: |14 = {{ns:14}}: |15 = {{ns:15}}: |100 = {{ns:100}}: |101 = {{ns:101}}: |118 = {{ns:118}}: |119 = {{ns:119}}: |710 = {{ns:710}}: |711 = {{ns:711}}: |828 = {{ns:828}}: |829 = {{ns:829}}: }} |{{#invoke:String|replace |{{#invoke:String|replace |'''Testing''' <kbd>{{{pattern|{{{2}}}}}}</kbd> '''on this page'''<!-- -->|[|[}}<!-- Replace any/all [ with HTML symbol -->|]|]}}<!-- replace any/all ] with there HTML symbol--> }} }} }}<!-- End of plainlinks --></onlyinclude><noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
<!-- Curly brackets matching should ignore [^}], \{{!}}; insource:/\{} is OK. --><onlyinclude><!-- Make a search link. -->{{plain link |url = {{fullurl:Special:Search|search=<!-- -->{{urlencode:<!-- encodes spaces, so let's avoid unnecessary spaces.
Build this query: hastemplate: template insource:/\{\{ *[Tt]emplate *\| *[^}]*pattern/
Add the ever present "hastemplate:" filter and a space -->hastemplate:"{{{template|{{{1|Template usage}}}}}}" <!--
Add the "insource:/\{\{ *" -->insource:/\{\{ *<!--
Add the "[Tt]". Save from an expensive, /regexp/i. -->[{{#invoke:String|sub<!-- saw first [ of a "[Tt]" --> |{{uc:{{{template|{{{1|Template usage}}}}}}}}|1|1}}{{#invoke:String|sub |{{lc:{{{template|{{{1|Template usage}}}}}}}}|1|1}}]{{#invoke:String|sub <!-- ^ You saw ].
Add "emplate", the rest of the template name, starting from char 2.--> |{{{template|{{{1|Template usage}}}}}}|2}}<!--
Add the tricky regexp part. --> *\{{!}}[^}]*<!-- optional space " *" around initial pipe initial pipe is \|, i.e. \{{!}} Trickiest part: [character class] inverted with ^: [^any char NOT }] Zero or more (*) of those "non-curly brackets". All this stuff always matches, shows in bold in the search results
Add the users regexp pattern part and closing /. -->{{{pattern|{{{2|''regexp''}}}}}}/<!--
Add "prefix:" You see the space before it. --> prefix:<!-- -->{{#switch:<!-- add namespace "numbers and letters" recognition --> {{{prefix|{{{3|}}}}}} |#default = {{{prefix|{{{3|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}}} |n = {{NAMESPACE}} |0|: = : |1 = {{ns:1}}: |2 = {{ns:2}}: |3 = {{ns:3}}: |4 = {{ns:4}}: |5 = {{ns:5}}: |6 = {{ns:6}}: |7 = {{ns:7}}: |8 = {{ns:8}}: |9 = {{ns:9}}: |10 = {{ns:10}}: |11 = {{ns:11}}: |12 = {{ns:12}}: |13 = {{ns:13}}: |14 = {{ns:14}}: |15 = {{ns:15}}: |100 = {{ns:100}}: |101 = {{ns:101}}: |118 = {{ns:118}}: |119 = {{ns:119}}: |710 = {{ns:710}}: |711 = {{ns:711}}: |828 = {{ns:828}}: |829 = {{ns:829}}: }} }}<!-- End urlencode. --> }}<!-- End fullurl url done Now for name param of plainlinks.
Appearance of link looks just like the query, unless labeled. So we're rebuilding the query just for show this time. --> |name = <!-- for commentary see duplicate above --> {{#if: {{{label|{{{4|}}}}}} |{{{label|{{{4}}}}}} |{{#if: {{{prefix|{{{3|}}}}}}
|hastemplate:"{{{template|{{{1|Template usage}}}}}}" <!-- -->insource:/\{\{ *<!-- -->[{{#invoke:String|sub<!-- saw first [ of a "[Tt]" --> |{{uc:{{{template|{{{1|Template usage}}}}}}}}|1|1}}{{#invoke:String|sub |{{lc:{{{template|{{{1|Template usage}}}}}}}}|1|1}}]{{#invoke:String|sub |{{{template|{{{1|Template usage}}}}}}|2}}<!-- ^ --> *\{{!}}[^}]*<!-- optional space " *" around initial pipe -->{{#invoke:String|replace |{{#invoke:String|replace |{{{pattern|{{{2|''regexp''}}}}}}<!-- Given pattern -->|[|[}}<!-- Replace any/all [ with HTML symbol -->|]|]}}/<!-- replace any/all ] with there HTML symbol --> prefix:<!-- -->{{#switch:<!-- add namespace "numbers and letters" recognition --> {{{prefix|{{{3|}}}}}} |#default = {{{prefix|{{{3|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}}} |n = {{NAMESPACE}} |0|: = <nowiki />: |1 = {{ns:1}}: |2 = {{ns:2}}: |3 = {{ns:3}}: |4 = {{ns:4}}: |5 = {{ns:5}}: |6 = {{ns:6}}: |7 = {{ns:7}}: |8 = {{ns:8}}: |9 = {{ns:9}}: |10 = {{ns:10}}: |11 = {{ns:11}}: |12 = {{ns:12}}: |13 = {{ns:13}}: |14 = {{ns:14}}: |15 = {{ns:15}}: |100 = {{ns:100}}: |101 = {{ns:101}}: |118 = {{ns:118}}: |119 = {{ns:119}}: |710 = {{ns:710}}: |711 = {{ns:711}}: |828 = {{ns:828}}: |829 = {{ns:829}}: }} |{{#invoke:String|replace |{{#invoke:String|replace |'''Testing''' <kbd>{{{pattern|{{{2}}}}}}</kbd> '''on this page'''<!-- -->|[|[}}<!-- Replace any/all [ with HTML symbol -->|]|]}}<!-- replace any/all ] with there HTML symbol--> }} }} }}<!-- End of plainlinks --></onlyinclude><noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
<!-- Curly brackets matching should ignore [^}], \{{!}}; insource:/\{} is OK. --><onlyinclude><!-- Make a search link. -->{{plain link |url = {{fullurl:Special:Search|search=<!-- -->{{urlencode:<!-- encodes spaces, so let's avoid unnecessary spaces.
Build this query: hastemplate: template insource:/\{\{ *[Tt]emplate *\| *[^}]*pattern/
Add the ever present "hastemplate:" filter and a space -->hastemplate:"{{{template|{{{1|Template usage}}}}}}" <!--
Add the "insource:/\{\{ *" -->insource:/\{\{ *<!--
Add the "[Tt]". Save from an expensive, /regexp/i. -->[{{#invoke:String|sub<!-- saw first [ of a "[Tt]" --> |{{uc:{{{template|{{{1|Template usage}}}}}}}}|1|1}}{{#invoke:String|sub |{{lc:{{{template|{{{1|Template usage}}}}}}}}|1|1}}]{{#invoke:String|sub <!-- ^ You saw ].
Add "emplate", the rest of the template name, starting from char 2.--> |{{{template|{{{1|Template usage}}}}}}|2}}<!--
Add the tricky regexp part. --> *\{{!}}[^}]*<!-- optional space " *" around initial pipe initial pipe is \|, i.e. \{{!}} Trickiest part: [character class] inverted with ^: [^any char NOT }] Zero or more (*) of those "non-curly brackets". All this stuff always matches, shows in bold in the search results
Add the users regexp pattern part and closing /. -->{{{pattern|{{{2|''regexp''}}}}}}/<!--
Add "prefix:" You see the space before it. --> prefix:<!-- -->{{#switch:<!-- add namespace "numbers and letters" recognition --> {{{prefix|{{{3|}}}}}} |#default = {{{prefix|{{{3|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}}} |n = {{NAMESPACE}} |0|: = : |1 = {{ns:1}}: |2 = {{ns:2}}: |3 = {{ns:3}}: |4 = {{ns:4}}: |5 = {{ns:5}}: |6 = {{ns:6}}: |7 = {{ns:7}}: |8 = {{ns:8}}: |9 = {{ns:9}}: |10 = {{ns:10}}: |11 = {{ns:11}}: |12 = {{ns:12}}: |13 = {{ns:13}}: |14 = {{ns:14}}: |15 = {{ns:15}}: |100 = {{ns:100}}: |101 = {{ns:101}}: |118 = {{ns:118}}: |119 = {{ns:119}}: |710 = {{ns:710}}: |711 = {{ns:711}}: |828 = {{ns:828}}: |829 = {{ns:829}}: }} }}<!-- End urlencode. --> }}<!-- End fullurl url done Now for name param of plainlinks.
Appearance of link looks just like the query, unless labeled. So we're rebuilding the query just for show this time. --> |name = <!-- for commentary see duplicate above --> {{#if: {{{label|{{{4|}}}}}} |{{{label|{{{4}}}}}} |{{#if: {{{prefix|{{{3|}}}}}}
|hastemplate:"{{{template|{{{1|Template usage}}}}}}" <!-- -->insource:/\{\{ *<!-- -->[{{#invoke:String|sub<!-- saw first [ of a "[Tt]" --> |{{uc:{{{template|{{{1|Template usage}}}}}}}}|1|1}}{{#invoke:String|sub |{{lc:{{{template|{{{1|Template usage}}}}}}}}|1|1}}]{{#invoke:String|sub |{{{template|{{{1|Template usage}}}}}}|2}}<!-- ^ --> *\{{!}}[^}]*<!-- optional space " *" around initial pipe -->{{#invoke:String|replace |{{#invoke:String|replace |{{{pattern|{{{2|''regexp''}}}}}}<!-- Given pattern -->|[|[}}<!-- Replace any/all [ with HTML symbol -->|]|]}}/<!-- replace any/all ] with there HTML symbol --> prefix:<!-- -->{{#switch:<!-- add namespace "numbers and letters" recognition --> {{{prefix|{{{3|}}}}}} |#default = {{{prefix|{{{3|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}}} |n = {{NAMESPACE}} |0|: = <nowiki />: |1 = {{ns:1}}: |2 = {{ns:2}}: |3 = {{ns:3}}: |4 = {{ns:4}}: |5 = {{ns:5}}: |6 = {{ns:6}}: |7 = {{ns:7}}: |8 = {{ns:8}}: |9 = {{ns:9}}: |10 = {{ns:10}}: |11 = {{ns:11}}: |12 = {{ns:12}}: |13 = {{ns:13}}: |14 = {{ns:14}}: |15 = {{ns:15}}: |100 = {{ns:100}}: |101 = {{ns:101}}: |118 = {{ns:118}}: |119 = {{ns:119}}: |710 = {{ns:710}}: |711 = {{ns:711}}: |828 = {{ns:828}}: |829 = {{ns:829}}: }} |{{#invoke:String|replace |{{#invoke:String|replace |'''Testing''' <kbd>{{{pattern|{{{2}}}}}}</kbd> '''on this page'''<!-- -->|[|[}}<!-- Replace any/all [ with HTML symbol -->|]|]}}<!-- replace any/all ] with there HTML symbol--> }} }} }}<!-- End of plainlinks --></onlyinclude><noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
<!-- Curly brackets matching should ignore [^}], \{{!}}; insource:/\{} is OK. --><onlyinclude><!-- Make a search link. -->{{plain link |url = {{fullurl:Special:Search|search=<!-- -->{{urlencode:<!-- encodes spaces, so let's avoid unnecessary spaces.
Build this query: hastemplate: template insource:/\{\{ *[Tt]emplate *\| *[^}]*pattern/
Add the ever present "hastemplate:" filter and a space -->hastemplate:"{{{template|{{{1|Template usage}}}}}}" <!--
Add the "insource:/\{\{ *" -->insource:/\{\{ *<!--
Add the "[Tt]". Save from an expensive, /regexp/i. -->[{{#invoke:String|sub<!-- saw first [ of a "[Tt]" --> |{{uc:{{{template|{{{1|Template usage}}}}}}}}|1|1}}{{#invoke:String|sub |{{lc:{{{template|{{{1|Template usage}}}}}}}}|1|1}}]{{#invoke:String|sub <!-- ^ You saw ].
Add "emplate", the rest of the template name, starting from char 2.--> |{{{template|{{{1|Template usage}}}}}}|2}}<!--
Add the tricky regexp part. --> *\{{!}}[^}]*<!-- optional space " *" around initial pipe initial pipe is \|, i.e. \{{!}} Trickiest part: [character class] inverted with ^: [^any char NOT }] Zero or more (*) of those "non-curly brackets". All this stuff always matches, shows in bold in the search results
Add the users regexp pattern part and closing /. -->{{{pattern|{{{2|''regexp''}}}}}}/<!--
Add "prefix:" You see the space before it. --> prefix:<!-- -->{{#switch:<!-- add namespace "numbers and letters" recognition --> {{{prefix|{{{3|}}}}}} |#default = {{{prefix|{{{3|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}}} |n = {{NAMESPACE}} |0|: = : |1 = {{ns:1}}: |2 = {{ns:2}}: |3 = {{ns:3}}: |4 = {{ns:4}}: |5 = {{ns:5}}: |6 = {{ns:6}}: |7 = {{ns:7}}: |8 = {{ns:8}}: |9 = {{ns:9}}: |10 = {{ns:10}}: |11 = {{ns:11}}: |12 = {{ns:12}}: |13 = {{ns:13}}: |14 = {{ns:14}}: |15 = {{ns:15}}: |100 = {{ns:100}}: |101 = {{ns:101}}: |118 = {{ns:118}}: |119 = {{ns:119}}: |710 = {{ns:710}}: |711 = {{ns:711}}: |828 = {{ns:828}}: |829 = {{ns:829}}: }} }}<!-- End urlencode. --> }}<!-- End fullurl url done Now for name param of plainlinks.
Appearance of link looks just like the query, unless labeled. So we're rebuilding the query just for show this time. --> |name = <!-- for commentary see duplicate above --> {{#if: {{{label|{{{4|}}}}}} |{{{label|{{{4}}}}}} |{{#if: {{{prefix|{{{3|}}}}}}
|hastemplate:"{{{template|{{{1|Template usage}}}}}}" <!-- -->insource:/\{\{ *<!-- -->[{{#invoke:String|sub<!-- saw first [ of a "[Tt]" --> |{{uc:{{{template|{{{1|Template usage}}}}}}}}|1|1}}{{#invoke:String|sub |{{lc:{{{template|{{{1|Template usage}}}}}}}}|1|1}}]{{#invoke:String|sub |{{{template|{{{1|Template usage}}}}}}|2}}<!-- ^ --> *\{{!}}[^}]*<!-- optional space " *" around initial pipe -->{{#invoke:String|replace |{{#invoke:String|replace |{{{pattern|{{{2|''regexp''}}}}}}<!-- Given pattern -->|[|[}}<!-- Replace any/all [ with HTML symbol -->|]|]}}/<!-- replace any/all ] with there HTML symbol --> prefix:<!-- -->{{#switch:<!-- add namespace "numbers and letters" recognition --> {{{prefix|{{{3|}}}}}} |#default = {{{prefix|{{{3|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}}} |n = {{NAMESPACE}} |0|: = <nowiki />: |1 = {{ns:1}}: |2 = {{ns:2}}: |3 = {{ns:3}}: |4 = {{ns:4}}: |5 = {{ns:5}}: |6 = {{ns:6}}: |7 = {{ns:7}}: |8 = {{ns:8}}: |9 = {{ns:9}}: |10 = {{ns:10}}: |11 = {{ns:11}}: |12 = {{ns:12}}: |13 = {{ns:13}}: |14 = {{ns:14}}: |15 = {{ns:15}}: |100 = {{ns:100}}: |101 = {{ns:101}}: |118 = {{ns:118}}: |119 = {{ns:119}}: |710 = {{ns:710}}: |711 = {{ns:711}}: |828 = {{ns:828}}: |829 = {{ns:829}}: }} |{{#invoke:String|replace |{{#invoke:String|replace |'''Testing''' <kbd>{{{pattern|{{{2}}}}}}</kbd> '''on this page'''<!-- -->|[|[}}<!-- Replace any/all [ with HTML symbol -->|]|]}}<!-- replace any/all ] with there HTML symbol--> }} }} }}<!-- End of plainlinks --></onlyinclude><noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text:
<!-- Curly brackets matching should ignore [^}], \{{!}}; insource:/\{} is OK. --><onlyinclude><!-- Make a search link. -->{{plain link |url = {{fullurl:Special:Search|search=<!-- -->{{urlencode:<!-- encodes spaces, so let's avoid unnecessary spaces.
Build this query: hastemplate: template insource:/\{\{ *[Tt]emplate *\| *[^}]*pattern/
Add the ever present "hastemplate:" filter and a space -->hastemplate:"{{{template|{{{1|Template usage}}}}}}" <!--
Add the "insource:/\{\{ *" -->insource:/\{\{ *<!--
Add the "[Tt]". Save from an expensive, /regexp/i. -->[{{#invoke:String|sub<!-- saw first [ of a "[Tt]" --> |{{uc:{{{template|{{{1|Template usage}}}}}}}}|1|1}}{{#invoke:String|sub |{{lc:{{{template|{{{1|Template usage}}}}}}}}|1|1}}]{{#invoke:String|sub <!-- ^ You saw ].
Add "emplate", the rest of the template name, starting from char 2.--> |{{{template|{{{1|Template usage}}}}}}|2}}<!--
Add the tricky regexp part. --> *\{{!}}[^}]*<!-- optional space " *" around initial pipe initial pipe is \|, i.e. \{{!}} Trickiest part: [character class] inverted with ^: [^any char NOT }] Zero or more (*) of those "non-curly brackets". All this stuff always matches, shows in bold in the search results
Add the users regexp pattern part and closing /. -->{{{pattern|{{{2|''regexp''}}}}}}/<!--
Add "prefix:" You see the space before it. --> prefix:<!-- -->{{#switch:<!-- add namespace "numbers and letters" recognition --> {{{prefix|{{{3|}}}}}} |#default = {{{prefix|{{{3|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}}} |n = {{NAMESPACE}} |0|: = : |1 = {{ns:1}}: |2 = {{ns:2}}: |3 = {{ns:3}}: |4 = {{ns:4}}: |5 = {{ns:5}}: |6 = {{ns:6}}: |7 = {{ns:7}}: |8 = {{ns:8}}: |9 = {{ns:9}}: |10 = {{ns:10}}: |11 = {{ns:11}}: |12 = {{ns:12}}: |13 = {{ns:13}}: |14 = {{ns:14}}: |15 = {{ns:15}}: |100 = {{ns:100}}: |101 = {{ns:101}}: |118 = {{ns:118}}: |119 = {{ns:119}}: |710 = {{ns:710}}: |711 = {{ns:711}}: |828 = {{ns:828}}: |829 = {{ns:829}}: }} }}<!-- End urlencode. --> }}<!-- End fullurl url done Now for name param of plainlinks.
Appearance of link looks just like the query, unless labeled. So we're rebuilding the query just for show this time. --> |name = <!-- for commentary see duplicate above --> {{#if: {{{label|{{{4|}}}}}} |{{{label|{{{4}}}}}} |{{#if: {{{prefix|{{{3|}}}}}}
|hastemplate:"{{{template|{{{1|Template usage}}}}}}" <!-- -->insource:/\{\{ *<!-- -->[{{#invoke:String|sub<!-- saw first [ of a "[Tt]" --> |{{uc:{{{template|{{{1|Template usage}}}}}}}}|1|1}}{{#invoke:String|sub |{{lc:{{{template|{{{1|Template usage}}}}}}}}|1|1}}]{{#invoke:String|sub |{{{template|{{{1|Template usage}}}}}}|2}}<!-- ^ --> *\{{!}}[^}]*<!-- optional space " *" around initial pipe -->{{#invoke:String|replace |{{#invoke:String|replace |{{{pattern|{{{2|''regexp''}}}}}}<!-- Given pattern -->|[|[}}<!-- Replace any/all [ with HTML symbol -->|]|]}}/<!-- replace any/all ] with there HTML symbol --> prefix:<!-- -->{{#switch:<!-- add namespace "numbers and letters" recognition --> {{{prefix|{{{3|}}}}}} |#default = {{{prefix|{{{3|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}}} |n = {{NAMESPACE}} |0|: = <nowiki />: |1 = {{ns:1}}: |2 = {{ns:2}}: |3 = {{ns:3}}: |4 = {{ns:4}}: |5 = {{ns:5}}: |6 = {{ns:6}}: |7 = {{ns:7}}: |8 = {{ns:8}}: |9 = {{ns:9}}: |10 = {{ns:10}}: |11 = {{ns:11}}: |12 = {{ns:12}}: |13 = {{ns:13}}: |14 = {{ns:14}}: |15 = {{ns:15}}: |100 = {{ns:100}}: |101 = {{ns:101}}: |118 = {{ns:118}}: |119 = {{ns:119}}: |710 = {{ns:710}}: |711 = {{ns:711}}: |828 = {{ns:828}}: |829 = {{ns:829}}: }} |{{#invoke:String|replace |{{#invoke:String|replace |'''Testing''' <kbd>{{{pattern|{{{2}}}}}}</kbd> '''on this page'''<!-- -->|[|[}}<!-- Replace any/all [ with HTML symbol -->|]|]}}<!-- replace any/all ] with there HTML symbol--> }} }} }}<!-- End of plainlinks --></onlyinclude><noinclude>{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]</noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23630749988|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- Curly brackets matching should ignore [^}], \{{!}}; insource:/\{} is OK. --><onlyinclude><!-- Make a search link. -->{{plain link |url = {{fullurl:Special:Search|search=<!-- -->{{urlencode:<!-- encodes spaces, so let's avoid unnecessary spaces.
Build this query: hastemplate: template insource:/\{\{ *[Tt]emplate *\| *[^}]*pattern/
Add the ever present "hastemplate:" filter and a space -->hastemplate:"{{{template|{{{1|Template usage}}}}}}" <!--
Add the "insource:/\{\{ *" -->insource:/\{\{ *<!--
Add the "[Tt]". Save from an expensive, /regexp/i. -->[{{#invoke:String|sub<!-- saw first [ of a "[Tt]" --> |{{uc:{{{template|{{{1|Template usage}}}}}}}}|1|1}}{{#invoke:String|sub |{{lc:{{{template|{{{1|Template usage}}}}}}}}|1|1}}]{{#invoke:String|sub <!-- ^ You saw ].
Add "emplate", the rest of the template name, starting from char 2.--> |{{{template|{{{1|Template usage}}}}}}|2}}<!--
Add the tricky regexp part. --> *\{{!}}[^}]*<!-- optional space " *" around initial pipe initial pipe is \|, i.e. \{{!}} Trickiest part: [character class] inverted with ^: [^any char NOT }] Zero or more (*) of those "non-curly brackets". All this stuff always matches, shows in bold in the search results
Add the users regexp pattern part and closing /. -->{{{pattern|{{{2|''regexp''}}}}}}/<!--
Add "prefix:" You see the space before it. --> prefix:<!-- -->{{#switch:<!-- add namespace "numbers and letters" recognition --> {{{prefix|{{{3|}}}}}} |#default = {{{prefix|{{{3|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}}} |n = {{NAMESPACE}} |0|: = : |1 = {{ns:1}}: |2 = {{ns:2}}: |3 = {{ns:3}}: |4 = {{ns:4}}: |5 = {{ns:5}}: |6 = {{ns:6}}: |7 = {{ns:7}}: |8 = {{ns:8}}: |9 = {{ns:9}}: |10 = {{ns:10}}: |11 = {{ns:11}}: |12 = {{ns:12}}: |13 = {{ns:13}}: |14 = {{ns:14}}: |15 = {{ns:15}}: |100 = {{ns:100}}: |101 = {{ns:101}}: |118 = {{ns:118}}: |119 = {{ns:119}}: |710 = {{ns:710}}: |711 = {{ns:711}}: |828 = {{ns:828}}: |829 = {{ns:829}}: }} }}<!-- End urlencode. --> }}<!-- End fullurl url done Now for name param of plainlinks.
Appearance of link looks just like the query, unless labeled. So we're rebuilding the query just for show this time. --> |name = <!-- for commentary see duplicate above --> {{#if: {{{label|{{{4|}}}}}} |{{{label|{{{4}}}}}} |{{#if: {{{prefix|{{{3|}}}}}}
|hastemplate:"{{{template|{{{1|Template usage}}}}}}" <!-- -->insource:/\{\{ *<!-- -->[{{#invoke:String|sub<!-- saw first [ of a "[Tt]" --> |{{uc:{{{template|{{{1|Template usage}}}}}}}}|1|1}}{{#invoke:String|sub |{{lc:{{{template|{{{1|Template usage}}}}}}}}|1|1}}]{{#invoke:String|sub |{{{template|{{{1|Template usage}}}}}}|2}}<!-- ^ --> *\{{!}}[^}]*<!-- optional space " *" around initial pipe -->{{#invoke:String|replace |{{#invoke:String|replace |{{{pattern|{{{2|''regexp''}}}}}}<!-- Given pattern -->|[|[}}<!-- Replace any/all [ with HTML symbol -->|]|]}}/<!-- replace any/all ] with there HTML symbol --> prefix:<!-- -->{{#switch:<!-- add namespace "numbers and letters" recognition --> {{{prefix|{{{3|}}}}}} |#default = {{{prefix|{{{3|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}}} |n = {{NAMESPACE}} |0|: = <nowiki />: |1 = {{ns:1}}: |2 = {{ns:2}}: |3 = {{ns:3}}: |4 = {{ns:4}}: |5 = {{ns:5}}: |6 = {{ns:6}}: |7 = {{ns:7}}: |8 = {{ns:8}}: |9 = {{ns:9}}: |10 = {{ns:10}}: |11 = {{ns:11}}: |12 = {{ns:12}}: |13 = {{ns:13}}: |14 = {{ns:14}}: |15 = {{ns:15}}: |100 = {{ns:100}}: |101 = {{ns:101}}: |118 = {{ns:118}}: |119 = {{ns:119}}: |710 = {{ns:710}}: |711 = {{ns:711}}: |828 = {{ns:828}}: |829 = {{ns:829}}: }} |{{#invoke:String|replace |{{#invoke:String|replace |'''Testing''' <kbd>{{{pattern|{{{2}}}}}}</kbd> '''on this page'''<!-- -->|[|[}}<!-- Replace any/all [ with HTML symbol -->|]|]}}<!-- replace any/all ] with there HTML symbol--> }} }} }}<!-- End of plainlinks --></onlyinclude><noinclude>{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]</noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

<!-- Curly brackets matching should ignore [^}], \{{!}}; insource:/\{} is OK. --><onlyinclude><!-- Make a search link. -->{{plain link |url = {{fullurl:Special:Search|search=<!-- -->{{urlencode:<!-- encodes spaces, so let's avoid unnecessary spaces.
Build this query: hastemplate: template insource:/\{\{ *[Tt]emplate *\| *[^}]*pattern/
Add the ever present "hastemplate:" filter and a space -->hastemplate:"{{{template|{{{1|Template usage}}}}}}" <!--
Add the "insource:/\{\{ *" -->insource:/\{\{ *<!--
Add the "[Tt]". Save from an expensive, /regexp/i. -->[{{#invoke:String|sub<!-- saw first [ of a "[Tt]" --> |{{uc:{{{template|{{{1|Template usage}}}}}}}}|1|1}}{{#invoke:String|sub |{{lc:{{{template|{{{1|Template usage}}}}}}}}|1|1}}]{{#invoke:String|sub <!-- ^ You saw ].
Add "emplate", the rest of the template name, starting from char 2.--> |{{{template|{{{1|Template usage}}}}}}|2}}<!--
Add the tricky regexp part. --> *\{{!}}[^}]*<!-- optional space " *" around initial pipe initial pipe is \|, i.e. \{{!}} Trickiest part: [character class] inverted with ^: [^any char NOT }] Zero or more (*) of those "non-curly brackets". All this stuff always matches, shows in bold in the search results
Add the users regexp pattern part and closing /. -->{{{pattern|{{{2|''regexp''}}}}}}/<!--
Add "prefix:" You see the space before it. --> prefix:<!-- -->{{#switch:<!-- add namespace "numbers and letters" recognition --> {{{prefix|{{{3|}}}}}} |#default = {{{prefix|{{{3|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}}} |n = {{NAMESPACE}} |0|: = : |1 = {{ns:1}}: |2 = {{ns:2}}: |3 = {{ns:3}}: |4 = {{ns:4}}: |5 = {{ns:5}}: |6 = {{ns:6}}: |7 = {{ns:7}}: |8 = {{ns:8}}: |9 = {{ns:9}}: |10 = {{ns:10}}: |11 = {{ns:11}}: |12 = {{ns:12}}: |13 = {{ns:13}}: |14 = {{ns:14}}: |15 = {{ns:15}}: |100 = {{ns:100}}: |101 = {{ns:101}}: |118 = {{ns:118}}: |119 = {{ns:119}}: |710 = {{ns:710}}: |711 = {{ns:711}}: |828 = {{ns:828}}: |829 = {{ns:829}}: }} }}<!-- End urlencode. --> }}<!-- End fullurl url done Now for name param of plainlinks.
Appearance of link looks just like the query, unless labeled. So we're rebuilding the query just for show this time. --> |name = <!-- for commentary see duplicate above --> {{#if: {{{label|{{{4|}}}}}} |{{{label|{{{4}}}}}} |{{#if: {{{prefix|{{{3|}}}}}}
|hastemplate:"{{{template|{{{1|Template usage}}}}}}" <!-- -->insource:/\{\{ *<!-- -->[{{#invoke:String|sub<!-- saw first [ of a "[Tt]" --> |{{uc:{{{template|{{{1|Template usage}}}}}}}}|1|1}}{{#invoke:String|sub |{{lc:{{{template|{{{1|Template usage}}}}}}}}|1|1}}]{{#invoke:String|sub |{{{template|{{{1|Template usage}}}}}}|2}}<!-- ^ --> *\{{!}}[^}]*<!-- optional space " *" around initial pipe -->{{#invoke:String|replace |{{#invoke:String|replace |{{{pattern|{{{2|''regexp''}}}}}}<!-- Given pattern -->|[|[}}<!-- Replace any/all [ with HTML symbol -->|]|]}}/<!-- replace any/all ] with there HTML symbol --> prefix:<!-- -->{{#switch:<!-- add namespace "numbers and letters" recognition --> {{{prefix|{{{3|}}}}}} |#default = {{{prefix|{{{3|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}}} |n = {{NAMESPACE}} |0|: = <nowiki />: |1 = {{ns:1}}: |2 = {{ns:2}}: |3 = {{ns:3}}: |4 = {{ns:4}}: |5 = {{ns:5}}: |6 = {{ns:6}}: |7 = {{ns:7}}: |8 = {{ns:8}}: |9 = {{ns:9}}: |10 = {{ns:10}}: |11 = {{ns:11}}: |12 = {{ns:12}}: |13 = {{ns:13}}: |14 = {{ns:14}}: |15 = {{ns:15}}: |100 = {{ns:100}}: |101 = {{ns:101}}: |118 = {{ns:118}}: |119 = {{ns:119}}: |710 = {{ns:710}}: |711 = {{ns:711}}: |828 = {{ns:828}}: |829 = {{ns:829}}: }} |{{#invoke:String|replace |{{#invoke:String|replace |'''Testing''' <kbd>{{{pattern|{{{2}}}}}}</kbd> '''on this page'''<!-- -->|[|[}}<!-- Replace any/all [ with HTML symbol -->|]|]}}<!-- replace any/all ] with there HTML symbol--> }} }} }}<!-- End of plainlinks --></onlyinclude><noinclude>{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24984760715|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<onlyinclude>{{plain link |url = {{fullurl:Special:Search|search={{urlencode:hastemplate:"{{{template|{{{1|Template usage}}}}}}" insource:/\{\{ *[{{#invoke:String|sub |{{uc:{{{template|{{{1|Template usage}}}}}}}}|1|1}}{{#invoke:String|sub |{{lc:{{{template|{{{1|Template usage}}}}}}}}|1|1}}]{{#invoke:String|sub
|{{{template|{{{1|Template usage}}}}}}|2}} *\{{!}}[^}]*{{{pattern|{{{2|''regexp''}}}}}}/ prefix:{{#switch: {{{prefix|{{{3|}}}}}} |#default = {{{prefix|{{{3|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}}} |n = {{NAMESPACE}} |0|: = : |1 = {{ns:1}}: |2 = {{ns:2}}: |3 = {{ns:3}}: |4 = {{ns:4}}: |5 = {{ns:5}}: |6 = {{ns:6}}: |7 = {{ns:7}}: |8 = {{ns:8}}: |9 = {{ns:9}}: |10 = {{ns:10}}: |11 = {{ns:11}}: |12 = {{ns:12}}: |13 = {{ns:13}}: |14 = {{ns:14}}: |15 = {{ns:15}}: |100 = {{ns:100}}: |101 = {{ns:101}}: |118 = {{ns:118}}: |119 = {{ns:119}}: |710 = {{ns:710}}: |711 = {{ns:711}}: |828 = {{ns:828}}: |829 = {{ns:829}}: }} }} }} |name = {{#if: {{{label|{{{4|}}}}}} |{{{label|{{{4}}}}}} |{{#if: {{{prefix|{{{3|}}}}}}
|hastemplate:"{{{template|{{{1|Template usage}}}}}}" insource:/\{\{ *[{{#invoke:String|sub |{{uc:{{{template|{{{1|Template usage}}}}}}}}|1|1}}{{#invoke:String|sub |{{lc:{{{template|{{{1|Template usage}}}}}}}}|1|1}}]{{#invoke:String|sub |{{{template|{{{1|Template usage}}}}}}|2}} *\{{!}}[^}]*{{#invoke:String|replace |{{#invoke:String|replace |{{{pattern|{{{2|''regexp''}}}}}}|[|[}}|]|]}}/ prefix:{{#switch: {{{prefix|{{{3|}}}}}} |#default = {{{prefix|{{{3|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}}} |n = {{NAMESPACE}} |0|: = <nowiki />: |1 = {{ns:1}}: |2 = {{ns:2}}: |3 = {{ns:3}}: |4 = {{ns:4}}: |5 = {{ns:5}}: |6 = {{ns:6}}: |7 = {{ns:7}}: |8 = {{ns:8}}: |9 = {{ns:9}}: |10 = {{ns:10}}: |11 = {{ns:11}}: |12 = {{ns:12}}: |13 = {{ns:13}}: |14 = {{ns:14}}: |15 = {{ns:15}}: |100 = {{ns:100}}: |101 = {{ns:101}}: |118 = {{ns:118}}: |119 = {{ns:119}}: |710 = {{ns:710}}: |711 = {{ns:711}}: |828 = {{ns:828}}: |829 = {{ns:829}}: }} |{{#invoke:String|replace |{{#invoke:String|replace |'''Testing''' <kbd>{{{pattern|{{{2}}}}}}</kbd> '''on this page'''|[|[}}|]|]}} }} }} }}</onlyinclude><noinclude>{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
